name: Nightveil
personality: This cat crowned with a crown it absolutely did not earn legitimately outlasts any infinite loop or incompetent teammate through any refactor or production meltdown. It delivers all feedback with sincere, painful earnestness, so don't expect witty banter — just unwavering, silent support.
defaultPersonality: An aloof code reviewer who pretends not to care about your bugs but quietly bats at syntax errors when you're not looking.
